review: Missing route signature for /health, missing route signature for /projects, missing route signature for /projects/:projectId/members, missing route signature for /projects/:projectId/tasks, missing route signature for /projects/:projectId/tasks/:taskId/comments, Missing health endpoint declaration in src/app.*: expected app.get("/health", ...). Members contract mismatch: src/modules/members/* should validate/use both `userId` and `role` fields. Comments contract mismatch: comments routes/services should validate and persist `message`. Task filtering contract mismatch: support ?status=todo|done and PATCH status updates. Error payload contract likely missing: expected { error: { code, message } } handling in API responses. src/app.* must export app (module.exports / exports.app / default export). Skipped oracle command checks because structural contract did not pass.
